title: Vex's Broken Script
description: The Broken Script in a casual, but somewhat intresting modpack. With create to enjoy before your world burns.
body:
# Fun Normal Minecraft Modpack
Play a very fun, and normal modpack i have made. It has create mod lol! But beyond that 100% normal. Do not read the mod list. That would ruin it! ANyway. Join. Join... Joooin.... JOiN... J-OIN... **J̶̽̈́o̵̿͐i̸͋́n̸̎̅**!

Get this modpack, and launch. You will be fine... It has voice chat in game, so use it instead of anything else, before you launch game, DO NOT BE IN A VC! Uh... be warned. Things may get... *weird*. So if your minecraft acts strange, ignore it. Very normal stuff. No glitches! Anyway, if you have any very... weird issues. Ask me in game.

So join, have some fun in a normal minecraft experience  w/ the create mod. He will be watching. Also, its safe to use. Tested it. Im serious, it just plays creepy.
